title: The Girl from Chicago
writer: Arthur Somers Roche, C. Graham Baker
actors: Conrad Nagel, Myrna Loy, William Russell
plot: A southern belle from Dixie, Mary Carlton (Myrna Loy), aided by her police detective lover "Handsome" Joe (Conrad Nagel), outwits and brings to justice the Chicago gangster, "Big Steve" Drummond, who murdered her brother Bob Carlton
